sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Two Dead After Planes Collide Near Arizona's Marana Regional Airport - Delta Air Lines  ( NYSE:DAL )
feed.summary: Two small planes collided midair near Marana Regional Airport in Arizona on Wednesday, killing two people, the National Transportation Safety Board said. A Cessna 172S landed safely, while a Lancair 360 MK II crashed and caught fire, reported The New York Times.
